detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use resetps driver.

sect1.title: xresetps_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XResetps driver directly. This example resets multiple peripheral block. A list of peripheral to be reset is maintained. It modifies the peripheral's register value, then resets the peripheral and then validates the register's value with reset value.
